options.name: --max-resource-count
options.description: Fail if any results have a resource count over the given value.

options.name: --max-duration-seconds
options.description: Fail if any results have a duration over the given value in seconds.

options.name: --max-resource-stddev
options.description:
Fail if multiple results exist for each proof obligation and the standard
deviation of their resource counts is over the given value.

options.name: --max-resource-cv-pct
options.description:
Fail if multiple results exist for each proof obligation and the coefficient
of variance (stddev / mean) of their resource counts is over the given
value (stated as an integer percentage).

options.name: --max-duration-stddev
options.description:
Fail if multiple results exist for each proof obligation and the standard
deviation of their durations is over the given value.

options.name: --max-duration-cv-pct
options.description:
Fail if multiple results exist for each proof obligation and the coefficient
of variance (stddev / mean) of their durations is over the given value (stated
as an integer percentage).
